prPacket.title: Enforce team billing seat limits on member invites
prPacket.summary: Adds seat usage accounting from the actual implementation diff, blocks invite creation at capacity, and preserves unlimited legacy teams.
checklist: Seat usage counts active members and pending invites.
At-limit teams receive a typed, actionable seat-limit error.
Null or undefined seat limits preserve unlimited legacy teams.
Seat availability is exposed for admin-facing copy and checks.
Verification passed with the generated test suite.

risks.title: Billing source of truth
risks.body: This demo reads seat limits from the local team record. Production should confirm payment-provider sync timing.

risks.title: Pending invite lifecycle
risks.body: Seat usage includes pending invites. Production should expire stale invites or expose cancellation clearly.
